title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Bosch India Software - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Bosch India Software - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Bosch India Software. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Bosch India Software:
Bosch India Software is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software!
